name: Technical Debt
about: Report technical debt or code quality issues
title: '[TECH DEBT] '
labels: technical-debt
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear description of the technical debt or code quality issue.

## Current State

Describe how the code/system currently works.

## Problems

What issues does this cause?

- [ ] Makes code harder to maintain
- [ ] Causes performance issues
- [ ] Increases risk of bugs
- [ ] Makes testing difficult
- [ ] Violates best practices
- [ ] Other: [describe]

## Proposed Improvement

How should this be refactored or improved?

## Files Affected

List the files that would need to be changed:

- `path/to/file1.js`
- `path/to/file2.js`

## Effort Estimate

- [ ] Low (< 1 day)
- [ ] Medium (1-3 days)
- [ ] High (3-7 days)
- [ ] Very High (> 1 week)

## Benefits

What would we gain from addressing this?

1. [Benefit 1]
2. [Benefit 2]

## Risks

What risks are involved in making this change?

## Breaking Changes

Would this require breaking changes?

- [ ] Yes - describe impact
- [ ] No

## Related Items

- Related to ROADMAP.md: [section]
- Related to issue #[number]

## Additional Context

Add any other context, code examples, or references here.

## Code Example

If applicable, show before/after code:

**Before**:
```javascript
// Current code
```

**After**:
```javascript
// Improved code
```
